title: vm-create-golden
description: Receipt for `testanyware vm create-golden`. Under --dry-run it carries the plan without mutating; on execution it identifies the created golden image. Both macOS and Windows goldens require a macOS host.

dry_run.description: Present and true when --dry-run was set; the plan is described but nothing is mutated.

platform.description: Target platform. macos and windows are supported (both macOS-host work); linux goldens are Tier 2.

version.description: OS version to provision. macOS: tahoe, sequoia, sonoma (default tahoe). windows: the release number (default 11).

name.description: Golden image name. Defaults to testanyware-golden-<platform>-<version>.

iso.description: windows only: path to the Windows ARM64 evaluation ISO (null when relying on the cached ISO).

created.description: Present and true on a successful (non-dry-run) golden creation.

boot_plan.description: macOS only: ordered boot sequence (3 normal + 2 recovery = 5 boots) that golden creation drives.

mode.description: Whether the boot is a normal boot or a macOS Recovery boot.

actions.description: Human-readable summary of what this boot performs.

plan.description: windows only: ordered phases (single-boot unattended install + agent provisioning) that golden creation drives.

phase.description: Which phase of the unattended build this is.

actions.description: Human-readable summary of what this phase performs.
